title: Loot Goblins
description: Adds small Goblins that explode into loot
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/sXw9JvbZgF8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Loot Goblins
Adds extremely rare, 1/10,000 chance to spawn, loot goblins that can replace anything in the world. When killed, they explode into huge piles of randomized loot! Comes in Five Flavors.

![infographicA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2NPhwqM/images/3509724ddbacca3d31b7e023c46d27fa24fe6a2d.png)
![goblin killed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2NPhwqM/images/9463561a1ffee8b8d8f14adecfcf70e65fa617a4.gif)

# Minor Goblins
More likely to spawn than regular Goblins, these guys each drop specific items and a few random items. 

![infographicB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2NPhwqM/images/c1de8b30b6e980787135bf02a4ccc6d7ee051ae9.png)

Gold Skeleton - Drops: Golden Bones which can be smelted into gold.

Lapis Zombie - Drops: Stoneflesh which can be smelted into lapis.

Redstone Creeper - Drops: Red Bomb which explodes into redstone dust.

Iron Spider - Drops: Iron Eye which can be smelted into iron.

Emerald Pillager - Drops: Emerald Crossbow, breaks into emeralds.

Quartz Hoglin - Drops: Quartzchop, smelts into Quartz and can be eaten.

Prismarine Enderman - Drops: Prismarine Pearl, breaks into prismarine.

Also adds Loot Beams (Configurable!)

![loot beams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2NPhwqM/images/3bc730dfdaf808307b461508cb5784b0ab251202.png)
![running](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2NPhwqM/images/b0ebcc80f107a367f76c061a0d16928b68fc1c0c.gif)
![skins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2NPhwqM/images/0a263581fffa7fa832f36a399875238fae1bfa45.gif)

# known issues
Due to load order being unpredictable, any mod that influences itemstack rendering could/will interfere with loot beams

Emerald Crossbow looks stupid
